speakers.name: Werner Vogels
speakers.title: VP & CTO
speakers.bio: Werner Vogels is the CTO and VP of Amazon.com, where he is responsible for driving the company's customer-centric technology vision.

speakers.name: Swami Sivasubramanian
speakers.title: VP of AI and Data
speakers.bio: Swami leads Amazon's AI and data services, including Amazon SageMaker, Amazon Bedrock, and all AWS database services.

speakers.name: Adam Selipsky
speakers.title: CEO
speakers.bio: Adam Selipsky is CEO of Amazon Web Services. He rejoined AWS in 2021, having previously spent 11 years with the company.

speakers.name: Mai-Lan Tomsen Bukovec
speakers.title: VP of Storage Services
speakers.bio: Mai-Lan leads Amazon S3, EBS, EFS, and all AWS storage services.

speakers.name: Deepak Singh
speakers.title: VP of Compute Services
speakers.bio: Deepak leads Amazon EC2, Lambda, and core compute services at AWS.

speakers.name: Emily Fox
speakers.title: Principal Solutions Architect
speakers.bio: Emily specializes in machine learning and AI solutions, helping customers build intelligent applications.

speakers.name: James Rodriguez
speakers.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
speakers.bio: James leads the cloud infrastructure team at Netflix, managing their AWS deployment at scale.

speakers.name: Sarah Chen
speakers.title: Head of Cloud Security
speakers.bio: Sarah oversees cloud security strategy and implementation at Capital One.

speakers.name: Michael Kim
speakers.title: Principal Engineer
speakers.bio: Michael architects data infrastructure and analytics platforms at Airbnb.

speakers.name: Lisa Patel
speakers.title: Director of ML Engineering
speakers.bio: Lisa leads the machine learning platform team at Lyft.

speakers.name: David Johnson
speakers.title: Cloud Architect
speakers.bio: David designs cloud-native healthcare solutions using AWS services.

speakers.name: Jennifer Williams
speakers.title: Staff Engineer
speakers.bio: Jennifer works on large-scale data processing and analytics at Spotify.

sessions.title: Monday Night Live with Peter DeSantis
sessions.description: Join Peter DeSantis, SVP of Utility Computing, for an evening of deep dives into AWS infrastructure innovations.

sessions.title: Swami Sivasubramanian Keynote
sessions.description: Discover the latest AI and machine learning innovations from AWS, including new capabilities in Amazon Bedrock and SageMaker.

sessions.title: Deep Dive on Amazon S3
sessions.description: Learn advanced Amazon S3 features including Intelligent-Tiering, Object Lambda, and security best practices.

sessions.title: Optimizing Lambda for Performance and Cost
sessions.description: Discover techniques to optimize AWS Lambda functions for better performance, lower latency, and reduced costs.

sessions.title: Zero Trust Security on AWS
sessions.description: Implement zero trust security architecture using AWS services including IAM Identity Center, VPC, and CloudTrail.

sessions.title: Building Production ML Systems with SageMaker
sessions.description: Build, train, and deploy production-grade machine learning models using Amazon SageMaker's complete ML workflow.

sessions.title: Real-Time Analytics with Amazon Kinesis
sessions.description: Process and analyze streaming data in real-time using Amazon Kinesis, Lambda, and analytics services.

sessions.title: Containers from Code to Production
sessions.description: Hands-on workshop: Build, containerize, and deploy applications using ECS, EKS, and Fargate.

sessions.title: Build a Data Lake on AWS
sessions.description: Workshop to architect and implement a secure, scalable data lake using S3, Glue, Athena, and Lake Formation.

sessions.title: Architecting for Resilience
sessions.description: Interactive discussion on designing highly available and fault-tolerant architectures using AWS services.

sessions.title: Advanced VPC Design Patterns
sessions.description: Chalk talk on VPC architecture patterns, Transit Gateway, and multi-account networking strategies.

sessions.title: Build a CI/CD Pipeline with CodePipeline
sessions.description: One-hour builder session to create an automated CI/CD pipeline using AWS CodePipeline and CodeBuild.

sessions.title: Build a Serverless API with API Gateway
sessions.description: Hands-on: Build a complete serverless REST API using API Gateway, Lambda, and DynamoDB.

sessions.title: Edge Computing with AWS Outposts
sessions.description: Quick overview of hybrid cloud solutions using AWS Outposts for on-premises deployments.

sessions.title: Graviton: Better Performance, Lower Cost
sessions.description: Learn how Graviton processors deliver better price-performance for your workloads.
